title: United India Insurance Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: United India Insurance Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with United India Insurance Capital India! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About United India Insurance Capital India:
United India Insurance Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance Capital India!
